name: God's Little Acre Nursery
description: Locally owned San Jose tree nursery serving the community for 30+ years. Specialises in grafted fruit trees including rare Persian and guava varieties at competitive prices. A go-to for the South Asian gardening community in the South Bay.

name: Yamagami's Garden Center
description: Full-service Cupertino garden centre with deep Bay Area expertise, a strong edibles section, bonsai, succulents, and regular educational classes. Trusted by South Bay gardeners for decades.

name: Greenfield Nursery
description: Family-owned 17-acre nursery in San Martin with a huge selection of palms, fruit trees, Japanese maples, and deer-resistant plants. Delivery available throughout the Bay Area.

name: West Valley Arborists
description: South Bay tree care specialists for pruning, removal, and health assessment. Call for advice on managing large trees or identifying tree disease issues.

name: Annie's Annuals & Perennials
description: Beloved Bay Area nursery specialising in heirloom and hard-to-find plants. Outstanding for adding character and rarity to any garden.

name: Sloat Garden Center
description: Bay Area's trusted local garden chain with strong expertise in NorCal growing conditions and a serious commitment to organics.

name: Berkeley Horticultural Nursery
description: A Bay Area institution since 1923. Rare plants, expert staff, and selection perfectly calibrated for the Bay's microclimates.

name: Armstrong Garden Centers
description: California's largest regional nursery chain with expert staff, wide plant selection, and free gardening classes. Great for all skill levels.

name: Green Thumb Nursery
description: Family-owned SoCal institution with outstanding California native plants, fruit trees, and vegetables at honest prices.

name: Theodore Payne Foundation
description: Non-profit nursery dedicated to California native plants. The definitive source for drought-tolerant CA natives and wildflower seed.

name: Walter Andersen Nursery
description: San Diego's full-service nursery since 1928. Deep expertise in coastal and inland SD climate — trusted for three generations.

name: Las Pilitas Nursery
description: California native plant specialists with unmatched depth. Exceptional for ecological restoration, wildlife habitat, and drought-resilient gardens.

name: Roger's Gardens
description: Award-winning OC nursery famous for exceptional seasonal displays and rare specialty plants. A destination for serious gardeners.

name: Barton Springs Nursery
description: Austin's premier organic nursery since 1991. Outstanding Texas native plant selection and sustainable gardening expertise.

name: The Natural Gardener
description: John Dromgoole's legendary Austin nursery. The premier destination for natural growing methods, heirloom seeds, and Central Texas know-how.

name: Shoal Creek Nursery
description: Austin neighbourhood nursery with a well-curated selection of plants that actually thrive in Central Texas. Friendly, expert staff.

name: SummerWinds Nursery
description: Full-service garden centres with a good variety of plants and gardening supplies, plus knowledgeable staff for everyday garden questions.

name: Buchanan's Native Plants
description: Houston's favourite native plant nursery with deep expertise in Gulf Coast natives and ecological landscaping for the humid south.

name: Rainbow Gardens
description: San Antonio's landmark independent nursery with 5 acres of plants. Trusted for South Texas growing advice for over 40 years.

name: North Haven Gardens
description: Dallas's beloved independent nursery since 1951. Exceptional plant knowledge, rare selections, and the best rose stock in DFW.

name: Calloway's Nursery
description: North Texas regional chain with deep DFW growing knowledge. Great selection of trees, shrubs, and plants adapted to North Texas clay.
